## 3.0.0 - 2026-04-23
### Breaking Changes
* **`AdditionalSourceInfo.nb_articles_for_7_d`** has been renamed to `nb_articles_for7d`. Update any attribute access from `.nb_articles_for_7_d` to `.nb_articles_for7d`.
### Added
* **`NlpDataEntity.qwen_embedding`** — new optional field providing a dense 1024-dimensional embedding generated by the Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B model, available for articles indexed from January 1, 2026 onward (requires `v3_nlp_embeddings` plan).
### Changed
* **`ClusteringThreshold`** default value updated from `0.6` to `0.7`; the documented example range has shifted to reflect updated similarity thresholds across all clustering-enabled endpoints.
* **`HasNlp` / `IncludeNlpData`** type aliases now document that NLP data is only available for articles indexed from July 2023 onward.
* **`NlpDataEntity.new_embedding`** docstring clarified to note availability only for articles indexed before January 1, 2026.
